mapper.select: SELECT * FROM daily_check_details WHERE check_id = #{checkId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO daily_check_details ( check_id, category_id, class_id, deduction_item_id, link_type, link_id, student_id, dormitory_id, classroom_id, deduct_score, remark, photo_urls, appeal_status, created_at, updated_at, deleted ) VALUES
( #{item.checkId}, #{item.categoryId}, #{item.classId}, #{item.deductionItemId}, #{item.linkType}, #{item.linkId}, #{item.studentId}, #{item.dormitoryId}, #{item.classroomId}, #{item.deductScore}, #{item.remark}, #{item.photoUrls}, #{item.appealStatus}, NOW(), NOW(), 0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE daily_check_details SET deleted = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id IN
#{id}
